# Templates & schemas

Reference documentation for the generated app schema and template structure.

| Doc                                                             | What it covers                                                                                            |
|----------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [Blueprint schema](blueprint-schema.md)                         | `blueprint.json` + `flows.json` — Langflow-style node graph, edge wiring, validation, runtime automations |
| [Template index](../../template/README.md)                      | Bundled templates — desktop-app, android-app, shared runtime                                              |
| [Desktop template README](../../template/desktop-app/README.md) | Generated desktop app — stack, build, layout                                                              |
| [Android template README](../../template/android-app/README.md) | Generated Android app — stack, build, JNI bridge                                                          |
Blueprint schema is the primary reference for the app graph format. Template READMEs are generated into each project.
